en: Who is like the wise?And who knows the interpretation of a thing? A man's wisdom makes his face shine, and the hardness of his face is changed.
zh: 誰像智慧人，誰知道事情的解釋呢？人的智慧使他容光煥發，使他臉上的戾氣轉消。

en: I say: Keep the king's command, because of God's oath to him.
zh: 我勸你，因為你指著 神起了誓，你就要遵守王的命令。

en: Be not hasty to go from his presence. Do not take your stand in an evil cause, for he does whatever he pleases.
zh: 不要輕率離開王的面前，也不要參與惡事，因為王可以隨己意作任何事。

en: For the word of the king is supreme, and who may say to him, "What are you doing?"
zh: 既然王的話有權柄，誰敢問他：“你在作甚麼？”

en: Whoever keeps a command will know no evil thing, and the wise heart will know the proper time and the just way.
zh: 遵守命令的，必不遭受災禍；智慧人的心，曉得時機，懂得判斷。

en: For there is a time and a way for everything, although man's trouble lies heavy on him.
zh: 各樣事務成就，都有合宜的時機和定局，儘管人的災禍重壓在自己身上。

en: For he does not know what is to be, for who can tell him how it will be?
zh: 他不曉得未來的事，將來要發生甚麼，誰能告訴他呢？

en: No man has power to retain the spirit, or power over the day of death. There is no discharge from war, nor will wickedness deliver those who are given to it.
zh: 沒有人能支配風 ，把它留住；沒有人能控制死期；戰爭之時，沒有人能免役；邪惡救不了行邪惡的人。

en: All this I observed while applying my heart to all that is done under the sun, when man had power over man to his hurt.
zh: 我看見了這一切，又專心查究在日光之下所發生的一切事。有這樣的一個時候：有人管轄別人，叫他受害。

en: Then I saw the wicked buried. They used to go in and out of the holy place and were praised in the city where they had done such things. This also is vanity.
zh: 然後我看見惡人得以埋葬，他們生前在聖地往來，而在他們這樣行的城中，竟被人遺忘。這也是虛空！

en: Because the sentence against an evil deed is not executed speedily, the heart of the children of man is fully set to do evil.
zh: 對惡行已判定的刑罰遲遲沒有執行，世人的心就充滿行惡的意圖。

en: Though a sinner does evil a hundred times and prolongs his life, yet I know that it will be well with those who fear God, because they fear before him.
zh: 罪人既然作惡百次，還享長壽，那麼我知道敬畏 神的人，就是在他面前存敬畏的心的，必享福樂。

en: But it will not be well with the wicked, neither will he prolong his days like a shadow, because he does not fear before God.
zh: 惡人卻沒有福樂，也得不到長壽；他好像影子的短暫，因為他在 神面前不存敬畏的心。

en: There is a vanity that takes place on earth, that there are righteous people to whom it happens according to the deeds of the wicked, and there are wicked people to whom it happens according to the deeds of the righteous. I said that this also is vanity.
zh: 在世上有一件虛空的事，就是義人照惡人所行的受報應，惡人照義人所行的得報償。我說，這也是虛空。

en: And I commend joy, for man has no good thing under the sun but to eat and drink and be joyful, for this will go with him in his toil through the days of his life that God has given him under the sun.
zh: 於是我稱頌快樂，因為人在日光之下最好是吃喝快樂。這是人在日光之下， 神賜給他一生的年日裡，從自己勞碌中所得的享受。

en: When I applied my heart to know wisdom, and to see the business that is done on earth, how neither day nor night do one's eyes see sleep,
zh: 我專心認識智慧，察看世上的勞碌─有人晝夜不眠─

en: then I saw all the work of God, that man cannot find out the work that is done under the sun. However much man may toil in seeking, he will not find it out. Even though a wise man claims to know, he cannot find it out.
zh: 於是我看見了 神的一切作為，知道在日光之下所發生的事，人不能查明；儘管人勞碌尋查，總是查不出來；即使智慧人以為知道了，還是查不出來。
